author: codex-agent

patch.value: Add dependency-cycle diagnostics to pm validate lifecycle checks
Extend pm validate with dependency cycle detection reporting so lifecycle gates surface cyclic blockers directly.
pm validate exposes dependency-cycle diagnostics with deterministic counts and sample cycle paths and configurable severity policy while preserving existing validate checks.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence used pm context pm search and open or in-progress lists. Net-new validate extension scope under pm-dw5s for dependency-cycle diagnostics.

message: Create task for issue #5 dependency cycle validation
